sections.heading: Right hand home row practice
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: ja, da, ga, ma, na, jag, dam, gam, man

jag dam gam
man da ja

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Right hand home row practice skills.
